creator: ultima@freebsd.org
text:
Hello solo_code,

Thanks for opening a bug. Will take a look at libzdb, thanks for the find!

Haven't tested seafile-gui in awhile, but I usually do a validation check every time I touch the port. I haven't seen this issue specifically, so will look into it. We are only talking about seafile-gui correct?

seafile-gui is a port specifically for the graphical client, where as www/seahub would be all the requirements for the server.
